concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains the official seal of the North Carolina Marine Fisheries in the top left corner of the first page. In the rendered HTML output, this image is missing and has been replaced by a plain text paragraph containing placeholder text `[Image: ...]`. There is no corresponding `` element for this meaningful organizational seal.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 1 shows the North Carolina Marine Fisheries seal logo in the top left corner.
concerns.output_quote: [Image: Seal of the North Carolina Marine Fisheries featuring a fish over an outline of the state]

concerns.analysis: The source document contains a single primary Roman numeral list from I to X. On Page 1, items I through VI are correctly identified as an ordered list with nested sub-items. However, on Pages 2 and 3, the subsequent list items (VII, VIII, IX, and X) are incorrectly converted into headings (H2 and H3) instead of continuing as list elements. Consequently, the sub-items for these sections are extracted as completely independent ordered lists rather than sub-lists under the main Roman numeral list
concerns.source_pdf_quote: List items formatted as "VII. PENDER COUNTY", "VIII. NEW HANOVER COUNTY", etc., in sequence with I through VI.

concerns.description: Link text pulled over but not hyperlinked
concerns.analysis: Several text phrases that are hyperlinked inline in the source PDF have been extracted as plain text without markdown link wrappers inside their corresponding body paragraphs. Although the link elements themselves were appended at the end of the pages as separate block elements, the inline text where they natively reside is flat and will not be clickable in the rendered flow.
concerns.location: Page 1, Item II (also occurs on Page 3 for 'latest proclamation' and 'PT-1-2024')

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 4 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=4, examples=['https://ncdenr.maps.arcgis.com/home/webmap/viewer.html?useEx', 'https://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/marine-fisheries/rules-pr', 'https://files.nc.gov/deq/documents/2023-12/PT-1-2024%20Amend']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.

concerns.description:
Header/footer elements retained in output (3): State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries
3441 ; Proclamation PT-2-2024
Pg. 2; Proclamation PT-2-2024
Pg. 3
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=3, pages_affected=3/3. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.

The source document heavily utilizes underlining for emphasis, specifically for county headers (e.g., 'V. CARTERET COUNTY/ONSLOW COUNTY', 'VI. ONSLOW COUNTY') and list item designations (e.g., 'A. West Channel - Island Channel', 'Item K. This proclamation describes...'). In the JSON output, this underlined text is converted to plain text with no underlining present, resulting in genuine loss of visual emphasis.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: V. CARTERET COUNTY/ONSLOW COUNTY [Underlined in PDF]
